stdin_parsed.last_assistant_message:
All committed and pushed. Here's what's done vs. what still needs manual action:

---

**Done:**
- agentmemory server installed + running (systemd `agentmemory.service`, auto-start on login)
- `~/.claude/settings.json`: CBM removed from `allowedTools`, swapped to `mcp__agentmemory__*`; agentmemory MCP added as `http://localhost:3111/mcp`; `precompact-hook` removed from PreCompact
- `code-nav-gate/marker/reminder` hooks updated — CBM references gone, agentmemory unlocks the gate alongside Serena
- `AGENTS.md` + `CLAUDE.md`: code navigation routing table added
- `default-llm-setup.md`: stack diagram, install steps, project template all updated
- All changes committed to chezmoi + pushed

**One manual step remaining — run inside Claude Code:**
```
/plugin marketplace add rohitg00/agentmemory
/plugin install agentmemory
```
This wires the 12 auto-capture hooks (SessionStart, PostToolUse, Stop, etc.) so agentmemory learns from every session automatically. Without it, the MCP tools work but agentmemory won't self-populate.

**Restart this Claude Code session** after running the plugin install — new settings.json and MCP server need to be picked up.

background_tasks.description: Verify agentmemory install and get binary path
